rationale: The cited paper (10.1509/jmr.11.0350) is highly aligned with the citing paper’s core topic: both study marketing-related legitimacy signals and VC funding in very young ventures using hazard-based time-to-funding designs. The citing note explicitly says it extends prior seed-funding research by adding trademark applications as an early marketing action, making this cited work a plausible foundational or direct comparison reference rather than an incidental mention.
